request: Add a baseline-owned `standup` skill — a read-only recap+recommend utility (release state from CHANGELOG + git commits-since-tag classified by conventional-commit type with the semver bump they trigger and pushed-vs-origin; backlog.md parsed into open/picked-up/dropped with epic parent→child resolution; pending-questions.md condensed; a recommended next pickup). Ships SKILL.md + a deterministic gather.mjs helper. owner: baseline. Touches governance counts (40→41 skills across CLAUDE.md, seed.md §16/§17, README, manifest.json, audit-baseline).
